title: cotula eckloniana
intro: Cotula eckloniana, also known as bush daisy or everlast, is a small, perennial herb native to the southwestern parts of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cotula eckloniana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Cotula eckloniana include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health issues.
